note: Zenodo version chain tracking. UPDATE this file IMMEDIATELY after every successful publish. The latest_deposit_id is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for 'which deposit to call actions/newversion on' — NEVER guess or use stale IDs.
canonical_citation: Phase 0 — Infrastructure setup. No publication yet.

publish_instructions.first_publish: Create new deposit: POST /api/deposit/depositions with {metadata: {title: '...', upload_type: 'publication'}}. THEN update this file with the deposit_id and DOI.
publish_instructions.subsequent_publishes: Create new version: POST /api/deposit/depositions/{latest_deposit_id}/actions/newversion. FIRST verify GET returns state='done'.
publish_instructions.token_check: Run scripts/zenodo-token-check.py if any 403 occurs before assuming token is dead.
